title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three strategies for increasing productivity with Claude Code based on Andrej Karpathy's approach: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video frames these as methods to achieve significant output multipliers in coding projects.
